description_long: This object is a dense, bushy potted plant with thick, twisting, greenish stems and elongated, narrow, dark brown leaves that radiate outward in all directions. The stems are robust and serpentine, giving the plant a wild, untamed appearance. The leaves are sparse compared to the stems, but they add a sharp, spiky texture to the overall form. There is no visible pot or container, suggesting the focus is on the plant itself. The coloration is primarily muted green for the stems and deep brown for the leaves, with no visible flowers or decorative elements. The plant appears artificial or stylized, possibly intended for decorative use in urban environments.
description: A bushy, stylized potted plant with thick, twisting green stems and sparse, spiky brown leaves, lacking a visible pot.
description_view_0: Front view shows the dense cluster of twisting stems and the outward spread of brown leaves.
description_view_1: Top-down angle highlights the radiating pattern of the leaves and the intertwining stems.
description_view_2: Rear view emphasizes the thick, looping stems and the sparse distribution of leaves.
description_view_3: Side view displays the serpentine nature of the stems and the sharp, spiky leaves extending outward.
